response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and leadership, but their background is heavily skewed toward scripting languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, D) and web/mobile development rather than the mandatory C++ and SQL experience on Windows required for this role. There is no evidence of fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise, and limited exposure to SQL Server/Oracle or high-performance C++ systems.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and leadership experience in multiple domains
Experience with SQL and databases (MongoDB, MySQL)
Active open-source contributions and technical workshops
concerns: Lacks 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience, particularly on Windows platform
No demonstrated experience in financial markets, fixed income, or capital markets systems
Primary expertise in scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript) rather than systems programming (C++)
